title: FDel Statement
description: This deletes the specified force object.
notes: This is used to delete any type of specified force object while the program is running. This deletes the object data starting with the start object and ending with the end object established in the parameters. The start object and end object must be the same type of object. In addition, please assign a smaller number to the start object than the end object. No error occurs when the object is not defined.
examples:
> FDel FC1       ' Deletes Force Control Object1
> FDel FT2, FT10 ' Deletes Force Trigger Object2 through 10
